acquisition method: working in the regime of data-dependent MS to MS/MS switch
alkylation reagent: alkylated with 200 mM (10 mM f.c.) methyl methanethiosulfonate (MMTS; Sigma, St. Louis, MO, USA)
alkylation concentration: alkylated with 200 mM (10 mM f.c.) methyl methanethiosulfonate (MMTS; Sigma, St. Louis, MO, USA)
cleavage agent: cleaved overnight with 10 µL of 0.1 µg/µL trypsin (Promega, Madison, WI, USA)
fragmentation method: with higher-energy collisional dissociation (HCD) type peptide fragmentation
instrument: coupled directly to the ion source of the Q Exactive mass spectrometer
ionization type: using 0.1% formic acid (FA; Sigma, St. Louis, MO, USA) in water as a mobile phase
labeling: Quantification of protein abundance was performed using the exponentially modified protein abundance index (emPAI) provided by Mascot.
reduction reagent: reduced with 0.5 M (5 mM f.c.) tris (2-carboxyethyl) phosphine (TCEP; Sigma, St. Louis, MO, USA)
reduction concentration: reduced with 0.5 M (5 mM f.c.) tris (2-carboxyethyl) phosphine (TCEP; Sigma, St. Louis, MO, USA)
